case_title: ALEXANDER REIMERS VS. UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,633.50 FILED BY REIMERS, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-23-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PURSUANT TO THE JUL-17-17 COURT ORDER IF PARTIES DO NOT APPEAR THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER REIMERS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REIMERS, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-25-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT REGARDING PAYMENT. IF THE PLAINTIFF RECEIVES PAYMENT AND THE CHECK CLEARS PARTIES DO NOT HAVE TO APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER REIMERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITEDHEALTHCARE INSURANCE COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
